entries.speaker: wynn
lines:
Another group of refugees from the eastern border.
Third one this week. Running out of room on the ledger.

entries.speaker: wynn
lines: Gate's still standing. Can't say that about much else.

entries.speaker: wynn
lines:
Gate's open but there's nowhere to go. People come in.
Nobody leaves.

entries.speaker: wynn
lines:
First caravan out since the rupture. Twelve wagons.
I counted twice to make sure I wasn't dreaming.
